abstract: Please join the IBM Data Science Community for our April 2022 virtual meetup. ⏰ Agenda 10.45am - Doors open 11.00am - Welcome 11.02am - IBM Community announcements 11.08am - R Shiny Dashboard in Real Life - Lessons Learned (Wendy Wang) 11:50am - Mingle 12:00pm - Official event ends (IBM community team and speakers may stick around a little bit longer if there are still more questions) 👨🏻‍💻 Speaker bio Wendy (Wanting) Wang (LinkedIn) is a senior data scientist with IBM Expert Labs, Data & AI. After graduating from Columbia University with a master’s degree in Quantitative Methods in the Social Sciences, she joined IBM and worked as a client-facing data scientist to tackle challenging business problems from various industries, covering use cases in data analytics, machine learning, deep learning, MLOps, and trustworthy AI. 🦄 Join your local IBM Community meetup team Want to get involved in your local IBM Community meetup and join the organizing team? Join our Slack!
event_title: IBM Data Science Community: R Shiny Dashboard in Real Life - Lessons Learned
title: IBM Data Science Community: R Shiny Dashboard in Real Life - Lessons Learned
